sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; to be bent, inflected, i.q. the kindred verbs עָבַת, עָבַט.

Piel עִוֵּת to bend, to curve, to pervert, Ecc 7:13. Metaph. to pervert right, Job 8:3 34:12 compare Amo 8:5 also with an accus. of person, to bend or pervert the cause of any one, Lam 3:36 Job 19:6 Psa 119:78. עִוֵּת דֶּרֶךְ פּ׳ to pervert any one’s way, i.e. to lead him astray, Psa 146:9.

Pual, part. crooked, Ecc 1:15.

Hithpael, to bow oneself, Ecc 12:3.

Derivative, עַוָּתָה.
